series_metadata.series_description: The Group Applications (AC-26) are received by BWC from the Third Party Administrators (TPA). The Group Applications documents the employer’s intent to participate in the Group Rating Program with BWC. When an employer is accepted into the Group Rating program that employer receives a discount on their BWC rates. The Universal Document Service (UDS) is an imaging concept that stores any type of electronic file, such as Microsoft Office documents, Adobe Acrobat, audio/video, Computer Aided Design (CAD), etc. as well as scanned images.
